Document:
# Core Rule 3 - Players need to be the age of 16 or above
Players must be at least [bold]16 years old[/bold] to participate in this server and its associated community spaces. This requirement exists due to the mature themes frequently present in gameplay, including violence, conflict, corruption, imprisonment, execution, and other intense narrative elements. The server is not designed for younger audiences.
We do not actively investigate or verify ages. However, if a player publicly states or confirms that they are under 16 — whether in-game, on Discord, or in administrative communication — they will be removed from the community.
Attempting to bypass this rule by joking about being underage, roleplaying as being underage, or repeatedly referencing age in a way that creates ambiguity may result in administrative action.
This rule exists to protect both minors and the community. There are no exceptions.
